__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
model_caveat: Universal FFs are atomistic — they predict total energy / forces / stress, not device-level PCE. The PCE value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: it is the certified perovskite-Si 2T tandem record (HZB / Helmholtz 32.5% 2024) that a notional MACE-MP-0 + drift-diffusion / SCAPS coupling would TRY to match in principle. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE: device PCE is a downstream property; electronic structure live in DFT-domain (MP / OMat24 / GNoME), not pure NNP-domain.
proxy_source: HZB (Helmholtz-Zentrum Berlin) certified perovskite-Si 2T tandem 32.5% record, May 2024 (Albrecht / Stannowski group press release + NREL chart entry); concurrent KAUST 33.7% 4T result (Stuckelberger 2024) and Longi 33.9% certified single-junction perovskite-Si reported in 2024 are cited in §4.A.11 for context
falsifier_text: certified-aperture PCE < 32% OR T80 < 1000h @ ISOS-L1 → FAIL

arxiv_anchor_refresh_2026_05_14.verdict_unchanged: falsifier_relation remains MARGINAL — record 32.5% (HZB May 2024) above 32% threshold; Nov 2025 fully-textured tandem only reached 30.3%, suggesting commodity scale still below target

unproven_markers_preserved: perovskite 25-yr operational lifetime UNVERIFIED at commercial scale
Br/I segregation under operating light HARD_WALL (Hoke effect)
Pb halide migration to encapsulant HARD_WALL on environmental regulation
honesty_caveats: T80 lifetime under ISOS-L1 is the binding falsifier together with PCE; this fixture pins PCE only. Even at 32.5% PCE, T80 < 1000h would FAIL the candidate. SPEC_FIRST preserved — this status does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED; an attributed external-lab measurement on the hxm-pv-tandem-002 chemistry (not the chart record) is required for that.
license_note: PCE record values are public NREL chart entries; vendor / HZB press releases govern (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
